opinion.h: WHITLEY v. NEW YORK APPEAL FROM THE APPELLATE DIVISION OF THE SUPREME COURT OF NEW YORK, FIRST JUDICIAL DEPARTMENT No. 268, Misc. Decided October 13, 1969
opinion.p: Henry B. Rothblatt and Emma A. Rothblatt for appellant.
The appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
396 U.S. 10 STOECKLE v. WISCONSIN APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF WISCONSIN No. 272, Misc. Decided October 13, 1969
41 Wis. 2d 378, 164 N.W.2d 303, appeal dismissed and certiorari denied.
The appeal is dismissed for want of jurisdiction. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for a writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
